data.content:
Branch: codex/5ca2-stale-dispatch-helper
Commit: 394b90684fea2b728581a9581bfe26c130f89d97

Implemented a neutral stale-beats dispatch helper that replaces raw FOOLERY GROOMING FAILURE text, preserves manual model selection for one-off reviews, and opens Settings directly to the Dispatch tab via `settings=dispatch`. Added coverage for settings URL section parsing.

Validation: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, `bun run build`, and Playwright smoke for `/beats?settings=dispatch` all passed.
